deterministic_detail.action:
Withdrawal of current valid GMP certificates: N/a – none issued for EU GMP.
Marketing authorisation action: The UK MAA has been withdrawn by the applicant.
Recall of batches: No batches have been supplied to the UK or EU
Prohibition of supply: No batches to be supplied to EU markets whilst this statement of non-compliance remains in force.
deterministic_detail.additional: The scope of this statement of non-compliance is limited to Sterile medicinal Oncology products manufactured on the 5th Floor of the No.50 Kenyan Road facility.
deterministic_detail.authority_country: Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (United Kingdom)
deterministic_detail.nature: The inspection identified a critical finding regarding sterility assurance of product. The controls in place were such that there was a significant risk that product may not be sterile and that this would not be detected due to lack of robust and repeatable aseptic and sterilisation processes. A second critical finding was identified related to contamination and degradation controls.
deterministic_detail.operations: [ 1.1 ] Sterile Products; [ 1.1.1 ] Aseptically prepared (processing operations for the following dosage forms); [ 1.1.1.2 ] Lyophilisates; [ 1.1.1.4 ] Small volume liquids; [ 1.4 ] Other products or manufacturing activity; [ 1.4.2 ] Sterilisation of active substances/excipients/finished products:; [ 1.4.2.1 ] Filtration

quotes.original: The inspection identified a critical finding regarding sterility assurance of product.
